channel.title: Commonplace on Picnic Spoons
channel.description: Recent content in Commonplace on Picnic Spoons

item.title: Book of Centuries
item.description: A reflection on historical memory, timelines, and the strange experience of placing lives, events, and ideas beside one another across centuries.

item.title: Domestic Culture
item.description: Notes on the making of a household life. One work-from-home, stay-at-home spouse’s experience with the mundane.

item.title: Education as Atmosphere
item.description: On creating the type of environment necessary for the learner to thrive: the ambiance for deep thought, and the atmosphere for creativity and synthesis.

item.title: Favorite Objects
item.description: A catalog of useful, beloved, ordinary objects that quietly gather meaning through everyday use.

item.title: Field Notebooks
item.description: Thoughts on, and examples of, notes from out in the field. Collections of musings, sketches, facts, observations, and impressions.

item.title: Libraries as Emotional Architecture
item.description: How the catalog of books I carry with me has influenced my perspective and built scaffolding from which to hang my experiences.

item.title: Returning to Writing Slowly
item.description: The gradual rebuilding of a writing practice over time. How I got myself back into writing - and how I’m still doing so today.

item.title: The Slow Accumulation of Knowledge
item.description: Learning as a lifelong, slow, snail-slow, endeavor. Exploring what it means to build wisdom and knowledge over long, long periods of time.

item.title: Things Worth Noticing
item.description: Things I find worth noticing in my daily life, with notes from the materials I use to deepen my attention and understanding.

item.title: What Gets Passed Down
item.description: Notes on inheritance beyond genetics: books, habits, songs, recipes, stories, educational values, emotional patterns, and ways of seeing the world.
